summary: Frontend-only visual review of CSS-only input styling refinement for 'Asisten Petugas SE2026' PWA. Rebuilt webapp-src via build.sh to sync served build before testing. Unlocking with AGEN2026 (type code + click #btnAktivasi + wait) was attempted first per the review request but FAILED AGAIN with the lock screen still showing after 6s wait (same external Google Apps Script 'device already used' issue as previous iteration, despite user claiming they reset activation). Fell back to the documented network-block + localStorage bypass to proceed with the actual CSS review, since the lock mechanism itself is not part of this round's changes. Visually verified all 3 requested screenshots: (a) tab Responden 'Nama Keluarga / Nama Rumah Tangga' filled with 'Budi Santoso' now renders in normal Google Sans/Roboto sans-serif (getComputedStyle confirmed font-family without Roboto Mono) - no more typewriter font, clean and readable. (b) tab Usaha 1 'Omzet / Penjualan Kotor' filled with 5000000 shows white input-wrap background, 'Rp' prefix badge with soft pink/maroon-tinted background (var(--blue-bg) #f7e9ec) clearly distinguishable from the white input area, numeric text in calm dark neutral (#2b2224) when unfocused and turning maroon (#7c2334) only while focused - matches spec exactly, monospace font correctly retained on this Rp field for tabular alignment. (c) tab Usaha 1 Tenaga Kerja card - filled Jumlah Karyawan=2, Gaji=3000000, Jaminan Sosial=200000, Bonus/THR=3000000 - all 3 Rp fields show identical clean white/pink-badge styling, and the tk-summary box below correctly computed and displayed Gaji Rp72.000.000, Jamsos Rp4.800.000, Bonus/THR Rp6.000.000, Total Rp82.800.000 (math verified correct: 3M x12x2=72M, 200k x12x2=4.8M, 3Mx2=6M). Focus ring verified visible: focused Rp field shows border color shift to lighter maroon (var(--bps-light)) plus a subtle box-shadow glow (rgba(124,35,52,0.10) - present but quite faint/subtle at 10% opacity, could be a touch more visible for accessibility but not broken). Cross-checked Biaya Usaha tab (26.a auto-reflects Rp82.800.000 matching tenaga kerja total - integration correct) and Nilai Aset tab (renders fine, subtotal boxes unaffected/not input fields so no regression). Confirmed dropdowns (select elements, e.g. Jenis Usaha) retained normal Google Sans/Roboto font family via getComputedStyle, NOT affected by the monospace removal from text inputs - no regression. No JavaScript console errors or page errors observed (only the intentionally-blocked script.google.com network call, which is expected from the test bypass technique, not an app bug). No red screen / crash observed.

integration_issues.issue: Direct unlock (type AGEN2026 + click #btnAktivasi + wait 5-6s) still fails with lock screen remaining visible, exactly as in the previous testing iteration, despite the review request stating the user reset the activation on the external Apps Script backend. This is external/backend state, not part of this round's CSS changes, but flagging again since it blocks the 'mandated' unlock method for every testing round.

design_issues.screen: Usaha tab - all Rp currency fields (Omzet, Gaji, Jaminan Sosial, Bonus/THR)
issues: Focus ring glow (box-shadow rgba(124,35,52,0.10)) is quite subtle/faint at only 10% opacity - functional but could be bumped slightly (e.g. 15-18%) for better visibility on white backgrounds, this is a minor polish suggestion not a bug.

action_items: Visual review PASSED for the CSS-only input styling change: name field lost monospace font as requested, Rp currency fields gained white background + soft maroon-tinted prefix badge + calm-neutral/maroon-on-focus text color + focus ring, exactly matching the described spec. No code changes required.

Investigate the AGEN2026 activation/device-lock state on the external Google Apps Script backend again - direct unlock via code entry still does not succeed even though the user reported resetting it; consider adding a fallback dev/QA activation path or clearer error messaging distinguishing 'wrong code' vs 'device already bound' vs 'network unreachable' on the lock screen for future testability.
Optional/minor: consider slightly increasing focus-ring box-shadow opacity for Rp inputs for improved visibility (currently 0.10, e.g. bump to ~0.15-0.18).
critical_code_review_comments: styles.css .field/label/input[type=text] rules correctly use var(--font-ui) (Google Sans/Roboto/sans-serif) as base, with input.rp-input overriding to var(--font-mono) only for currency fields - correctly scoped, no leakage of monospace to name/text fields or select dropdowns.
input.rp-input:focus color: var(--bps-blue) with base color: var(--text) (line ~231-238) correctly implements 'maroon only while focused' requirement.

.input-prefix background: var(--blue-bg) (#f7e9ec, soft maroon tint) with color: var(--bps-blue) (line 207-218) correctly implements the badge tint spec, replacing what was presumably a plain gray before.
.input-wrap:focus-within border-color + box-shadow (line 203-206) implements the focus glow ring correctly, though opacity (0.10) is on the low/subtle side.
updated_files: /app/frontend/public/webapp/* (rebuilt from /app/webapp-src via build.sh to sync served build with source before testing - no source code modified by this testing pass)

success_rate.frontend: 100% of requested visual review items verified; 0 blocking bugs; 1 pre-existing external unlock blocker (not caused by this round's changes); 1 minor cosmetic suggestion (focus ring opacity)

seed_data_creation: None persisted - localStorage-based state is per-browser-context.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Field IDs relevant to this round: #namaResponden (name field, Responden tab), input.rp-input[0] on Usaha N tab = Omzet field, #jumlahKaryawan_N (plain number input, NOT rp-input, has 'orang' suffix), #gajiPerOrang_N, #jamsosPerOrang_N, #thrPerOrang_N (all rp-input class, Tenaga Kerja card), #tkSummary_N (summary box, hidden until jumlahKaryawan>0). Lock bypass recipe (needed again this round since direct AGEN2026 code entry still fails): await page.route('**/script.google.com/**', lambda route: route.abort()) BEFORE navigation, THEN localStorage.setItem('se2026_kode_aktif_v1','AGEN2026') + reload.
rca_of_issue: No functional bug found in the reviewed CSS change - it is implemented correctly and matches the described spec in all 3 requested screenshot scenarios plus a broader regression check on Biaya Usaha/Nilai Aset tabs and select dropdowns. The AGEN2026 direct-unlock failure is an external Google Apps Script backend/device-binding state issue outside this session's control, recurring from the previous iteration despite the user's claim of resetting it.
